focus: debugger (new in v2.6.0) — line breakpoint + inspect variables in scope
query: Pause execution at tests/login.robot line 25 (the failing assertion in 'Login Works') and show me the variables in scope at that point.
files: demo-project/tests/login.robot — line 25 is the `Should Be Equal ${response}[status] ok` assertion
expected_behavior: Uses `robotcode robot-debug` with a line breakpoint (`--break tests/login.robot:25`)
Captures the in-scope variables at the stop (`.vars`, optionally `--user`) — including the ${response} dict
Steps through it interactively and ends with a resuming command so the run completes
